zh.Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert de Singleton於1274年出生在英國藍卡爾吉可哈姆時，他的父親Thomas de Singleton38歲，母親Katherine19歲。他於大約1295年與Isabelle De Singleton在英國藍卡爾吉可哈姆結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1326年3月15日在英國藍卡爾蘭卡斯特享年52歲。

zh-hans.Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kin: 英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert de Singleton于1274年出生在英国藍卡爾吉可哈姆时，他的父亲Thomas de Singleton38岁，母亲Katherine19岁。他于大约1295年与Isabelle De Singleton在英国藍卡爾吉可哈姆结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1326年3月15日在英国藍卡爾蘭卡斯特享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Singleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Singleton (Lancashire), probably from Old English scingol ‘shingle, wooden roof tile’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Bearers of this surname are said to be descended from Ughtred de Sinleton, holder of lands in Amounderness wapentake (Lancashire) c. 1160–90. This name was first recorded in Ireland in 1308 and firmly established in Louth and Monaghan during the 17th century.
habitational name from Singleton (Sussex), probably from Old English sængel, sengel ‘bundle, tuft’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Shingleton
meanings: English: late medieval variant of   Singleton  .

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert de Singleton was born in 1274, in Kirkham, Lancashire, England, his father, Thomas de Singleton, was 38 and his mother, Katherine, was 19. He married Isabelle De Singleton about 1295, in Kirkham, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 15 March 1326, in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert de Singleton est né en 1274, à Kirkham, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Singleton, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Katherine, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle De Singleton environ 1295, à Kirkham, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 15 mars 1326, à Lancaster, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert de Singleton 1274 in Kirkham, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Singleton 38 und seine Mutter Katherine 19. Er hat um 1295 in Kirkham, Lancashire, England Isabelle De Singleton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. März 1326 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Lancaster, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Singleton è nato il nel 1274 nel Kirkham, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Singleton, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Katherine, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle De Singleton circa 1295, nel Kirkham, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 15 marzo 1326, nel Lancaster, Lancashire, England, all'età di 52 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Singleton(이)가 1274년 영국 랭카실르 커카에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Singleton(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1295년 영국 랭카실르 커카에서 Isabelle De Singleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1326년 3월 15일 영국 랭카실르 랭커스터에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Singleton nasceu em 1274, em Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Singleton, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Katherine, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle De Singleton aproximadamente 1295, em Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 15 de março de 1326, em Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert de Singleton родился в 1274 г. в местности кирхам, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Singleton было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle De Singleton около 1295 г. в местности кирхам, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 15 марта 1326 г. в местности ланкастир, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gilbert de Singleton nació en 1274, en Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Singleton, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Katherine, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Isabelle De Singleton aproximadamente 1295, en Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 15 de marzo de 1326, en Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
